Any system failure will lead to a delay in receiving information, so sometimes...

Any system failure will lead to a delay in receiving information, so sometimes...
description_uk: Баллистика долетает до Киева за 2-4 минуты, а вся информация о пусках или подготовке к ним поступает в Украину от партнеров, - Флеш Советник министра обороны Сергей Бескрестнов отметил, что основным источником информации об угрозах является спутниковое наблюдение за точками запуска и система фиксации фактов запуска. description: Russia left key military facilities in the Far North without anti-aircraft defense. This happened against the background of an intensifying campaign of attacks by our guys. "Radio Svoboda" publishes satellite images, which show that the systems were removed from several strategic objects that were previously under the protection of S-300 and S-400. The photos from July 6 show that the Rogachevo Air Base is on Novaya Zemlya...
description_en: Russia left key military facilities in the Far North without anti-aircraft defense. This happened against the background of an intensifying campaign of attacks by our guys. The photos from July 6 show that the Rogachevo Air Base is on Novaya Zemlya...

"Радио Свобода" публикует спутниковые снимки, на которых видно, что системы были сняты с нескольких стратегических объектов, ранее находившихся под охраной С-300 и С-400. description: As pressure on Crimea heats up, Sea of Azov enters Ukraine’s crosshairs Over the past nine days, Ukraine has launched a sustained drone campaign against Russian shipping in the Sea of Azov, opening a new front in its effort to “isolate Crimea” and disrupt Moscow’s military logistics and export routes. Photo: YouTube / Robert “Madyar” Brovdi.

title: Flirting with AI bots is also treason. Scientists from Canada...

description: Flirting with AI bots is also treason. Scientists from Canada conducted a survey among 1,815 Canadian adults. Respondents were asked if their partner would become a traitor if he had open correspondence with AI. Three quarters of people admitted that the situation would definitely lead to a conflict. At the same time, about half would call such behavior treason. According to scientists, people are attracted by the reliability of AI - communicate with...
description_en: Flirting with AI bots is also treason. Scientists from Canada conducted a survey among 1,815 Canadian adults. Respondents were asked if their partner would become a traitor if he had open correspondence with AI. Three quarters of people admitted that the situation would definitely lead to a conflict. At the same time, about half would call such behavior treason. According to scientists, people are attracted by the reliability of AI - communicate with...
description_uk: Флиртовать с ИИ-ботами - это тоже измена Учёные из Канады провели опрос среди 1815 взрослых канадцев. Респондентов спросили, стал бы их партнёр изменником, если бы вёл откровенные переписки с ИИ. Три четверти людей признались, что ситуация бы точно привела к конфликту. При этом около половины назвали бы такое поведение изменой. По мнению учёных, людей привлекает безотказность ИИ - общаться с...

title_en: Kyiv: 794 injured
title_uk: Київ: 794 поранених
description: June deadliest month for civilians in Ukraine since April 2022, U.N. says. The toll surpassed May's already-record civilian casualties, when 282 people were killed and 1,794 injured, and marked a 37% increase compared with June 2025.
description_en: June deadliest month for civilians in Ukraine since April 2022, U.N. says. The toll surpassed May's already-record civilian casualties, when 282 people were killed and 1,794 injured, and marked a 37% increase compared with June 2025.

description: "Banderol" is a budget missile that the enemy will not be able to launch in large quantities - adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergey "Flash" Beskrestnov According to him, the production plan for this year is 120 missiles per month, which means that the enemy will be able to launch only 4 such missiles every day. According to his estimates, the plant has not yet reached the planned production rate. "The missile has an OFBCH-150 s 50 kg warhead...
description_en: "Banderol" is a budget missile that the enemy will not be able to launch in large quantities - adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergey "Flash" Beskrestnov According to him, the production plan for this year is 120 missiles per month, which means that the enemy will be able to launch only 4 such missiles every day. According to his estimates, the plant has not yet reached the planned production rate. "The missile has an OFBCH-150 s 50 kg warhead...

description: Ukrainian pilots no longer need to be in the immediate vicinity of the front line. More and more Ukrainian units operate remotely in this way, including to protect the lives of soldiers, Zeit writes. This front line, in which almost nothing moves, in some places...
description_en: Ukrainian pilots no longer need to be in the immediate vicinity of the front line. More and more Ukrainian units operate remotely in this way, including to protect the lives of soldiers, Zeit writes. This front line, in which almost nothing moves, in some places...
description_uk: Украинским пилотам больше не нужно находиться в непосредственной близости от линии фронта. Все больше украинских подразделений действуют таким образом дистанционно, в том числе для защиты жизней солдат, пишет Zeit Благодаря новым разработкам дроны летают на всё большие расстояния, в результате чего растёт kill zone. description: EU's von der Leyen to visit Kyiv on July 15, reportedly with defense agenda. The European Commission is preparing a combined support package for Ukraine worth up to 18 billion euros ($21 billion), with announcements on this expected during von der Leyen's visit, TVP World reported.
